name: Back Layout
description: Body floats straight, face-up on surface, sculling under hips

name: Front Layout
description: Body floats straight, face-down on surface, sculling by chest

name: Tub
description: Both legs pulled to chest, shins and feet parallel on surface

name: Ballet Leg
description: Back layout with one leg extended perpendicular to body

name: Inverted Tuck
description: Body curled in tuck position while inverted underwater

name: Support Scull
description: Forearms at 90 degrees, moved back and forth to support body

name: Propeller Scull
description: Propels the body headfirst across the surface

name: Eggbeater Kick
description: Alternating circular breaststroke kick for treading and lifting

name: Spin 180
description: Half rotation while in vertical position

name: Double Ballet Leg
description: Both legs extended and held perpendicular to the body

name: Flamingo
description: Ballet leg with bottom leg pulled into chest, shin touching knee

name: Crane
description: Vertical body, one leg vertical, other at 90-degree L shape

name: Back Tuck Somersault
description: From back layout, full 360-degree backward rotation

name: Porpoise
description: Rise to vertical position from a submerged approach

name: Tower
description: Front layout to pike, lift one leg to crane, other to vertical

name: Spin Up 360
description: Full ascending spin, rising while rotating 360 degrees

name: Torpedo Scull
description: Propels body feet-first in a streamlined position

name: Pair Boost
description: Two swimmers lift a third briefly above the surface

name: Team Support Lift
description: Team forms a base to raise one swimmer to a held pose

name: Pair Acrobatic
description: Two-swimmer acrobatic with one flyer and one base

name: Circle
description: All swimmers arranged in a ring, often rotating

name: Straight Line
description: All swimmers in a single row

name: Diagonal Line
description: Swimmers in an angled line across the pool

name: V-Formation
description: Swimmers in a V or chevron shape

name: Diamond
description: Four or more swimmers forming a diamond shape

name: Knight
description: Surface arch with one leg lifted to vertical

name: Split Position
description: Upside-down splits, one leg forward, one back on surface

name: Barracuda
description: From submerged back pike, rapid upward thrust to vertical

name: Front Walkover
description: Front layout through pike, crane, split to back layout in a continuous arc

name: Aurora
description: Front layout to somersault to submerged double ballet leg to knight

name: Ariana
description: Walkover back to split position, hips rotating 180 degrees

name: London
description: Ballet leg to partial somersault, trunk unrolls to vertical

name: Barrel Scull
description: Creates rotation of the body along its long axis

name: Combined Spin 360+360
description: Ascending spin followed by descending spin, 720 total

name: Twist 360
description: Full rotation at constant height, no ascending or descending

name: Balance Stack
description: Featured swimmer stands on support swimmers in head-up position

name: Platform Lift
description: Team forms stable base, featured swimmer lifted to pose

name: Star / Pinwheel
description: Swimmers radiating from center point in multi-armed pattern

name: Cyclone Open 180
description: Figure featuring an open 180-degree rotation

name: Swordfish Straight Leg
description: Figure with straight-leg Ariana rotation

name: Albatross Spin Up 360
description: Complex figure ending with 360-degree ascending spin

name: Flying Fish Spinning 360
description: Figure with a full 360-degree spinning movement

name: Airborne Throw
description: Swimmer thrown into the air, fully disconnecting from team

name: Platform with Dismount
description: Platform lift ending with a jump or dismount

name: Continuous Spin 720
description: Rapid descending spin of at least 720 degrees

name: Whip Continuous Spin 720
description: Figure culminating in a rapid descending 720-degree continuous spin

name: Barracuda Airborne Split
description: Barracuda with rocket split, rejoining vertical with 180 spin

name: Flamingo Combined 720
description: Flamingo with combined ascending and descending 720-degree spin

name: Combined Airborne-Balance
description: Combines airborne throw with balance stack in sequence

name: Rocket Split
description: Swimmer executes an airborne split during a throw or thrust

name: Continuous Spin 1080
description: Three full rapid descending rotations

name: Vertical
description: Body straight and upside-down, perpendicular to surface

name: Surface Arch
description: Body arched at the surface, head in line with hips

name: Stationary Scull
description: Maintains position in the water without movement

name: Back Pike
description: Body bent at hips in pike position while face-up

name: Front Pike
description: Body bent at hips in pike position while face-down

name: Bent Knee (Heron)
description: Vertical body, one leg vertical, other bent with toe at knee

name: Fishtail
description: Like crane but bottom foot must be at the surface

name: Side Fishtail
description: One leg vertical, other extended to the side creating a Y shape

name: Alligator Scull
description: Propels body headfirst in a back layout with arms at sides

name: Paddle Scull
description: Used for lateral or directional movement

name: Canoe Scull
description: One-armed scull for turning and curved travel

name: Spin Down 360
description: Full descending spin while sinking in vertical position

name: Twist 180
description: 180-degree rotation at constant height, no ascending

name: Blossom
description: Multi-movement figure performed at Grade 2 level

name: Catalina Rotation
description: Rotation transition used within larger figures

name: Neptunus
description: Multi-movement competition figure at Grade 2 level

name: Square / Block
description: Swimmers forming a rectangle or square grid

name: Triangle
description: Swimmers in a triangular arrangement

name: Submerged Back Pike
description: Back pike position performed fully submerged

name: Saturn
description: Complex multi-position figure with transitions

name: Spinning Scull
description: Generates rapid rotation while in vertical position

name: Split Scull
description: Used to support body during split position elements

name: Totem Scull
description: Specialized scull for totem-style vertical support

name: Team Acrobatic
description: Acrobatic involving four or more swimmers

name: Staggered Lines
description: Parallel lines with offset positions for visual depth

name: Pattern Change
description: Morphing from one formation to another mid-choreography (+0.3 bonus)

name: Ipanema Spinning 180
description: Figure with a 180-degree spinning component

name: Airborne Jump
description: Swimmer jumps from construction with a repulsion phase

name: Balance Stack (Head Down)
description: Featured swimmer on support in vertical head-down position

name: Combined Airborne-Platform
description: Combines airborne throw with platform lift characteristics

name: Head First Boost & Descent
description: Eggbeater pop upward from underwater, then controlled descent

name: Walkover Transition
description: Arcing movement through split, crane, and knight positions

name: Thrust Combo
description: Rapid upward thrust from submerged pike chained with a spin

name: Custom Hybrid (5-skill)
description: Coach-designed sequence of 5+ skills with declared difficulty

name: Custom Hybrid (7-skill)
description: Advanced coach-designed sequence of 7 chained skills

name: Sailboat
description: Back layout with one arm extended straight up like a sail

name: Pencil
description: Perfectly straight body held vertical with toes at surface

name: Starfish Float
description: Arms and legs spread wide in a back float, star shape

name: Oyster
description: Pike position at the surface then open flat, like an oyster shell

name: Dolphin Kick
description: Undulating full-body kick for speed and power underwater

name: Log Roll
description: Body rotates along its long axis while floating at the surface

name: Water Wheel
description: Swimmers rotate like spokes of a wheel, head to toe

name: Chain Link
description: Swimmers link arms or legs in a connected chain

name: Double Kick Lift
description: Two bases kick a flyer briefly above the water

name: Mermaid Tail
description: Legs pressed together and swept up in an arcing tail motion

name: Corkscrew
description: Descending spiral with body rotating and sinking simultaneously

name: Scissors Kick
description: Alternating leg splits performed rapidly while vertical

name: Reverse Scull
description: Sculling in reverse direction for backward travel

name: Fan Formation
description: Swimmers spread in a fan or semicircle shape

name: Cross Formation
description: Swimmers arranged in a plus or cross pattern

name: Tandem Lift
description: Two swimmers lifted simultaneously by the rest of the team

name: Vertical Descent
description: Controlled sinking in vertical at the tempo of the music

name: Spiral Descent
description: Spinning while descending underwater in a controlled spiral

name: Rocket Thrust
description: Explosive vertical thrust from underwater to maximum height

name: Helicopter
description: Horizontal rotation at the surface with arms acting as blades

name: Chain Spin
description: Linked swimmers rotate together as a connected unit

name: Pyramid Lift
description: Multi-tier lift forming a human pyramid above the water

name: Walkout Back
description: From split position, back leg sweeps over to back layout

name: Double Spin 360
description: Two consecutive 360 spins without pause

name: Catapult Throw
description: Team launches swimmer high into the air with catapult motion

name: Mirror Formation
description: Two halves of the team mirror each other perfectly

name: Cascade Hybrid
description: Sequence of skills performed in cascading order across the team

name: Triple Spin 1080
description: Three full rotations executed with perfect control

name: Tower Launch
description: Full team tower followed by top swimmer launch and aerial

name: Kaleidoscope
description: Constantly shifting symmetrical pattern like a kaleidoscope

name: Grand Finale Hybrid
description: Ultimate 8+ skill chain designed as a show-stopping closer
